title: Chlorophyll
description: A mod which brings async world ticking to mc
body:
# Chlorophyll
[![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/CyanidinMC/Chlorophyll?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/CyanidinMC/Chloriphyll/issues)
![Commit Activity](https://img.shields.io/github/commit-activity/w/CyanidinMC/Chlorophyll?style=flat-square)
![CodeFactor Grade](https://img.shields.io/codefactor/grade/github/CyanidinMC/Chlorophyll?style=flat-square)
![GitHub Repo stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/CyanidinMC/Chlorophyll?style=flat-square)
![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/CyanidinMC/Chlorophyll)

## What is this?
Chlorophyll is a simple mod that brings async world ticking(each world ticking in its dependent tick loop) to MC, aiming to improve the server's performance when running a bunch of worlds.

## How to use it?
 - Install fabric 1.21.4
 - Install Moonrise and FabricAPI
 - Download the jar and put it into the mods folder.
 - Done

## Dependenices
 - FabricAPI
 - Moonrise
 - ClothConfig

## Download
We don't offer direct download links currently because it's still in the alpha state. If you want to get the jar, please visit the Action page of the repo.

## Warn
This mod is still in the alpha stage. Please notice any crashes or exceptions and report them to us! Also, please think twice before using it in the production environment. We are not responsible for any losses caused by this mod.
